headline: Assessing American Electric Power Company (AEP) Valuation After Reaffirmed Growth Outlook And AI Data Center Load Forecast
summary: Why American Electric Power Company (AEP) is back in focus American Electric Power Company (AEP) is drawing fresh attention after reaffirming its long term earnings growth targets and sharply increasing its 2030 contracted load forecast, driven by rising demand from large power users and AI focused data centers. See our latest analysis for American Electric Power Company. The reaffirmed long term outlook and larger 2030 contracted load forecast come after a period of strong share price...

headline: Leadership Shift And New Debt Raise: What Story Is AEP (AEP) Telling About Its Grid Strategy?
summary: American Electric Power recently named Adrian Rodriguez as president and chief operating officer of AEP Texas, following Judith Talavera’s departure, while AEP Texas also issued US$750 million of 5.20% Senior Notes due 2036 to support its transmission and distribution business serving about 1.09 million customers. Rodriguez’s extensive regulatory and utility background, combined with fresh funding at the Texas subsidiary, underscores AEP’s focus on operational execution and grid investment...
